mapper.select: SELECT m.member_id, m.project_id, u.user_name, u.email, u.profile_image, r.role_id, r.role_name, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY m.member_id ASC) FROM members m JOIN users u ON m.user_code = u.user_code LEFT JOIN member_roles mr ON m.member_id = mr.member_id LEFT JOIN roles r ON mr.role_id = r.role_id WHERE m.project_id = #{projectId} ORDER BY m.member_id ASC

SELECT u.user_code, u.user_name, u.email, u.profile_image FROM users u WHERE u.status = 'a2' AND u.user_code NOT IN ( SELECT m2.user_code FROM members m2 WHERE m2.project_id = #{projectId} )
AND u.user_name LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
ORDER BY u.user_name
SELECT role_id, role_name FROM roles ORDER BY role_id

SELECT m.member_id, m.project_id, m.user_code, u.user_name, u.email, u.profile_image, r.role_id, r.role_name FROM members m JOIN users u ON m.user_code = u.user_code LEFT JOIN member_roles mr ON m.member_id = mr.member_id LEFT JOIN roles r ON mr.role_id = r.role_id WHERE m.member_id = #{memberId}
